worlds.name: Starter Gym
worlds.description: Your journey begins here. Walk around the gym to build muscle and arm wrestle your first opponents.

opponents.name: Nerdy Kid
opponents.description: The weakest opponent. A great first challenge.

opponents.name: Big Bully
opponents.description: A school bully with some muscle. Needs 650 strength.

opponents.name: Headmaster
opponents.description: The headmaster of the school. A moderate challenge.

opponents.name: Athlete Boy
opponents.description: A star athlete. Requires 30K strength.

opponents.name: Gym Bro
opponents.description: A dedicated gym rat. Serious muscle needed.

opponents.name: King Boxer
opponents.description: The boxing champion. 1M strength required.

opponents.name: Giga Chad
opponents.description: The meme legend himself. 1M strength required.

opponents.name: Bodyguard
opponents.description: A massive bodyguard. 7.5M strength needed.

opponents.name: Mafia Boss
opponents.description: The mafia boss of the gym. 25M strength required.

opponents.name: The Unknown
opponents.description: The final boss of World 1. 111M strength needed.

worlds.name: Fantasy World
worlds.description: A magical realm with powerful fantasy opponents. Pets and eggs available here are stronger.

opponents.name: Caveman
opponents.description: A prehistoric warrior. 450M strength needed.

opponents.name: Evil Pirate
opponents.description: A fearsome pirate captain. 1B strength required.

opponents.name: Samurai
opponents.description: A master swordsman. 3.5B strength needed.

opponents.name: Cookie King
opponents.description: The ruler of cookies. 10B strength required.

opponents.name: Skelly Giant
opponents.description: A massive skeleton giant. 50B strength needed.

opponents.name: Wizard
opponents.description: A powerful dark wizard. 175B strength required.

opponents.name: Sky Lord
opponents.description: The lord of the skies. 420B strength needed.

opponents.name: Devil
opponents.description: The devil himself. 1.5T strength required.

opponents.name: Tech Titan
opponents.description: The final boss of Fantasy World. 12T strength needed.

worlds.name: The Rock Zone
worlds.description: A meme-themed world featuring The Rock and other hilarious opponents. Trolls and brain-rot pets await!

opponents.name: The Rock
opponents.description: Dwayne 'The Rock' Johnson himself. 67T strength needed!

opponents.name: Troll
opponents.description: An internet troll with massive strength.

opponents.name: Skippy Toilet
opponents.description: The legendary Skippy Toilet. Pure meme power.

worlds.name: Cyber City
worlds.description: The final futuristic world. The strongest opponents in the game await with astronomical strength requirements.

opponents.name: Cyber Security Guard
opponents.description: A futuristic security guard. 225T strength needed.

opponents.name: Gardener
opponents.description: A cyber gardener with immense power. 1.5Q strength.

opponents.name: Astronaut
opponents.description: A space-faring astronaut. 4Q strength needed.

opponents.name: Galaxy Minor
opponents.description: A minor galaxy entity. 15Q strength required.

opponents.name: Green Alien
opponents.description: The final boss of Cyber City. 79Q strength needed. The ultimate challenge.
